title: taraxacum album
intro: Taraxacum album, also known as White Dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties that have been used for centuries to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and liver and kidney disorders, due to its high content of bitter compounds and flavonoids. The health benefits of Taraxacum album include improving liver function, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. Taraxacum album can be prepared in various ways, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
